'''Niktha''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] beggar who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In 32 BBY, he was wanted dead for 200 credits by the owner of the [[Dust Bowl saloon]] in [[Mos Gamos]] for turning away potential patrons with his aggressive begging. In the same year, he was killed and his bounty claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who had been hunting for [[Longo Two-Guns]] to gain an audience with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure|Jabba]] the Hutt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
